    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ScoreFour
    The main method is the starting point of the program.
    MENU - Enum constant in enum class scorefour.common.GameState
     
    MENU - Static variable in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    The index of the menu song.
    MenuController - Class in scorefour.controller
    MenuController manages the menu state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    MenuController(MenuView, AudioController, ProgramController) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.MenuController
    Constructs a MenuController object with the given MenuView used to display the menu.
    MenuView - Class in scorefour.view
    MenuView initializes a fixed visual overlay and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    MenuView() - Constructor for class scorefour.view.MenuView
    Constructs a MenuView which stores a menu background image.
    mode - Static variable in enum class scorefour.common.VersusMode
    Allows the modification and reading of VersusMode
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
     
    mouseDragged(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
     
    mouseEntered(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
     
    mouseExited(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
     
    MouseInputs - Class in scorefour.controller
    MouseInputs listens to various user inputs which occur in a designated Panel.
    MouseInputs(Panel) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
    Constructs a new MouseInputs and assigns it to listen to a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in interface scorefour.common.Interactable
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.BoardController
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
    Communicates the current mouse position status with the different GameState's
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.PegController
    Checks when a mouse has been moved and detects where the mouse is in a Panel.
    mouseOver - Variable in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
     
    mouseOver - Variable in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
     
    mousePressed - Variable in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
     
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in interface scorefour.common.Interactable
    Communicates with controllers when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.BoardController
    Communicates with controllers when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
    Communicates with OverlayController and BoardController when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController
    Communicates with ButtonController when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
    Communicates the current mouse press status with the different GameState's
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
    Communicates with ButtonController when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.PegController
    Communicates with controllers when a mouse button has been pressed.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in interface scorefour.common.Interactable
    Communicates with controllers to set the GameState and any additional changes depending on the button released.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.BoardController
    Communicates with controllers to set the GameState and any additional changes depending on the button released.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
    Communicates with OverlayController when the mouse has been released.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController
    Communicates with ButtonController to set the GameState depending on the button released.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.MouseInputs
    Communicates the current mouse release status with the different GameState's
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.OverlayController
    Communicates with ButtonController to set the GameState depending on the button released.
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class scorefour.controller.PegController
    Communicates with controllers to set the GameState and any additional changes depending on the button released.
